Intro paragraph. The default template is a plain article — best for concepts and
long-form text. Use `##` and `###` headings; they appear in the right-hand TOC.

## A section

Body text, **bold**, `inline code`, and [links](/docs/getting-started).

A highlighted aside. type = note | tip | warning | danger.
